description: validate a skill's SKILL.md frontmatter (name/description/naming rules) — read-only
rules: checks frontmatter present, name + description fields, hyphen-case naming, length limits
usage: Set SKILL_DIR (a skill folder containing SKILL.md). Output: validate.out.
limitation: Read-only structural check of frontmatter only; does not lint the body or run resources. Requires python3 + PyYAML.
